Doljonijiarnimorinar  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 33 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Doljon's Rage (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
Lord Bob's Axe on Fippy
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2012 at 3:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1629678399592
2 posts
So this axe on Fippy (the progression server) has a weight of -10.0 (yes NEGATIVE weight). If you equip it or just put it in a bag / inventory slot it decreases your overall weight. Great for monks due to their weight restrictions.

Not sure if it is like this on other servers.
▲ Page top
Lord Bob's Axe on Fippy

QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2004 at 4:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783455411
7 posts
Just wanted to see if this weapon is still out there, still tradeable, and is Beserker usable ( Also if it has an axe graphic) Any help/info be appreciated, thanks.

Bal

p.s. Also interested in buying one, am on Cazic Thule server if any might be interested.

▲ Page top
RE: Still Out there?
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2004 at 10:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795431846
27 posts
Not sure what you mean by "still out there". I assume it still drops.

But as to your other questions, it is still droppable, it can indeed be used by the berzerker class, and it still procs at level 1. :)
▲ Page top
woot
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2003 at 8:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362348699
8 posts
I get this for my level 1 paly.....
Start procecss in the first hit, i love, i can take any red, w/ this and temp, i get level every 10 minutes, means i am alredy level 10, in 2 hours...2 hours...lol...i paid 7kk, but for me...this value much more.$$$$
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 21 2003 at 8:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The Doljonijiarnimorinar is a superb low level pk weapon. I am a level 10 Ranger and plan to be 20. The first person to attack me in Kelethin felt Doljonijiarnimorinar's friendliness at once and did not make it very far before becoming a rotting corpse. I have a Wavecrasher, a Wrapped Entropy Serpent Spine, a Wind Etched Staff, and a Wurmslayer in addition to the Doljonijiarnimorinar. Needless to say I put all my points into Dexterity with this ******* of procking weapons. But Doljonijiarnimorinar, despite its high delay, seems to proc most of all. A lovely little axe, and I just love the name. My firstborn will be named thus!
Nice!
QuoteReply
# May 13 2003 at 2:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784415865
3 posts
I have an admitted twink warrior Lvl32 who carries one of these. It is a truly amazing weapon! You will Lvl like you never have before with the strength of this proc. The best thing about it is that it starts procing @ Lvl1. It is however an $$$ item to purchase (7K+) but well worth it.
▲ Page top
Proc
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 8:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787481186
3 posts
Got this bad boy and am very happy. It procs at lvl 1 for 140dd. Get your dex up over 100 and it procs more. Also get a haste item and as a war you can rule everything yellow and down that dont cast.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 14 2002 at 4:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTB one on Brell. Made a mistake and Traded mine for SCHW and 2kpp :( I want one back! Payign well. PST to Islude
Nice Weapon
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 4:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252433793
51 posts
I recently obtained this axe, and even though I can get a 2hs with better damage/delay ratio, when you factor in the proc this is really a nice weapon. Not to mention that it looks cool and isn't a common weapon. I have been extremely pleased overall with the damage and appearance of it.
▲ Page top
this weap rocks
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 2:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251774853
11 posts
My son's SK uses this thing with SCHW...he outdamages everyone in his group. he's lvl 44 with strength at 168 unbuffed...with some good shammy buffs on him he's hittin 140+ and procs 4-5 times in a fight...he's hittin really fast and hard.

Asaku 44 Shadowknight
Krystaleyes 48 Shaman on the Veeshan server

Its not AE, its DD. I know, i have it, i proced it, it hit one target and only one target. No resist from other targets.

# Jan 13 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default

3 posts
Ok this is not a lvl 49 druid spell whoever says it is is stupid. my main char has been a druid for the 3 years i have played eq and we do not get this spell
▲ Page top
Great scam artist name
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 12:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769051269
74 posts
Just thought this name closely resembles the one used by con artists of Gfay who scam newbs of the trading world to sell low and buy very high. With a name like that, the person is ussually just going to except getting scammed and not waste there time on trying to fill out an accurate report on him to a GM who really doesnt give a hoot about the market place. Also this would be the ideal name for a would be KS expert. imagine killing HGs for some cash and Hibhjuenhdjhdajdbneu kills a Hill Giant pops up and you dont get the experience. For one it would stun you to see such a long name, and 2, youd be getting attacked by about 4 HGs by the time you were finished typing /tell Hibhjuenhd... lol the sheer brilliance is that comparable to a news station telling locals exactly how the unibomber made his bombs out of ordinary house hold materials.
▲ Page top
RE: Great scam artist name
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2003 at 12:27 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776031056
30 posts
Real simple way to avoid that long bout of typing to get the name spelled out.

very simply type /ttell with him targeted and it sends him the tell. And if you dont wanna spell it out if you ever gotta report someone to the GM's, keep them targeted, and substitute thier name with this %t . This inserts thier name in a sentance. Just a little finger saving info for those who have to hunt and peck like me. lol
▲ Page top
RE: Great scam artist name
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 11:19 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1595780119357
View User Forum
166 posts
What the hell are you talking about?

(O.o) /confused

PROC from the SPDAT
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 12:18 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591763718324
5 posts
Doljons Rage
Decrease Hit Points (HP) by 140 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Cold

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: Instant

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You are encased in a cone of icy rage.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is encased in a cone of icy rage.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
▲ Page top
Clarification on the proc
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 6:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764529187
1 post
I've had this for about 3 days now and have been fighting 4 to 5 mobs at one time in the ToFS. When it procs, it's a single target 140 cold DD. No point AoE, no general AoE.

Great weapon.
